name: TienPin United Enterprise CO., LTD.
summary: TienPin United Enterprise CO., LTD. operates as a flash storage manufacturer in Taiwan. The company designs, manufactures, and sells portable storage products. It offers flash card readers/writers and adapters, digital photo frames, digital signage products, LCD TV player modules, fingerprint devices, and flash drives. The company was formerly known as DataFab Systems Inc. and changed its name to TienPin United Enterprise CO., LTD. in July 2015. TienPin United Enterprise CO., LTD. is headquartered in Pingzhen, Taiwan.
